subject: fix(mobile): increase touch target sizes for WCAG 2.5.5 compliance
body:
Bump padding on interactive elements that were below the 44px minimum:

- RadioField/CheckboxGroupField: py-2 → py-2.5 (~40px → ~44px with text)
- RatingField stars: add p-1 padding for explicit 44px+ touch area
- PageTabs remove button: p-1 → p-1.5 (~24px → ~30px, constrained by tab height)
- SubmissionTable filter buttons: py-1 → py-1.5 (~28px → ~34px)
- SubmissionTable pagination buttons: py-1/px-2 → py-1.5/px-3

Tags: mobile, accessibility, touch-targets, wcag
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch
